hero.subtitle: Online Election Portal of India
hero.title: Democracy Digitized
hero.desc: Cast your vote securely using OTP and Face Recognition. No application required—verified voters are pre-listed for maximum security.

vote_card.title: Cast Your Vote
vote_card.active_elections: Active elections. Choose one to participate.
vote_card.no_active: No elections are currently active. Check back later.
vote_card.security_note: Verified identity required via OTP + Live Face Match.

nomination_card.title: Candidate Nomination
nomination_card.desc: Apply to stand for elections and represent your constituency. (Registered Candidates only)

features.title: Why DigiVote?
features.subtitle: Digitizing democracy with security, speed, and absolute transparency.
features.security_desc: End-to-end encryption ensures your vote remains anonymous and tamper-proof.
features.results_desc: Automated counting delivers real-time results immediately after polling ends.
features.access_desc: Vote from the comfort of your home or anywhere in the world.

mission.title: Our Mission for a Digital India
mission.desc: Our goal is to empower every Indian citizen with a seamless, secure, and modern voting experience. We believe that technology can break barriers to participation and ensure that every voice is heard without compromise.
mission.point1: 100% ID verification through Aadhaar or Voter ID links.
mission.point2: Transparent application review process for all candidates.
mission.point3: Real-time tracking of voter turnout and demographic stats.

quote.text: "The ballot is stronger than the bullet."
quote.desc: In 2026, we are taking this power to the digital age. Your vote is anonymized using advanced cryptographic protocols, ensuring that even the administrators cannot see who you voted for.

process.title: How Digital Voting Works
process.step1_desc: Enter your pre-registered Email or Phone number to request a secure OTP.
process.step2_desc: Verify your request with the 6-digit code sent to your linked device.
process.step3_desc: Complete biometric matching against your official photo in the database.
process.step4_desc: Safely cast your vote once high-security verification is successful.

dashboard.create_election_desc: Launch a new voting event with custom parameters.
dashboard.represent_desc: If you meet the eligibility criteria, you can apply to become a candidate in the upcoming elections. Your voice matters!
dashboard.no_elections_desc: Check back later for upcoming voting events.

login.exercise_right: Exercise your democratic right. Securely access your ballot and cast your vote.
login.apply_candidate_prompt: Interested in standing for election? Apply as Candidate
login.role_mismatch: Role mismatch. Please use the appropriate portal for login.
login.otp_fail: Failed to send OTP. Please check your email/phone.

voter_register.sidebar_desc: Secure your digital presence. Verified via OTP and Biometric Face Recognition.
voter_register.capture_success: Photo captured successfully. Proceed to finish enrollment.
voter_register.position_face: Position your face within the frame. Ensure good lighting.
voter_register.already_registered: You are already registered! Redirecting to vote...
voter_register.reg_success: Registration successful! You can now cast your vote.
voter_register.face_required: No face detected. Please position yourself clearly.
voter_register.preparing_models: Face recognition system is preparing. Please wait...

register.register_desc: Join the digital platform for candidates. Register today to apply for upcoming elections and serve your constituency.
register.name_placeholder: Enter Name as per Govt. Records

vote.match_facing: Hello {{name}}, please look at the camera to verify your identity.
vote.no_face: No face detected. Please position yourself correctly.
vote.success_msg: Your vote has been cast successfully!
vote.camera_not_ready: Camera not ready. Please look at the lens.

results.realtime_desc: Real-time voting trends. These are not final results.
results.no_stats: No statistics are available to the public yet.
results.final_counts_soon: Final verified counts will be posted here soon.
results.ended_not_published: Election has ended. Results are waiting to be published by the Admin.
results.live_trends_soon: The Election Commission will release live trends shortly.

nomination.review_desc: Please review all your details carefully before submitting. Once submitted, you cannot edit your application until it is processed by the admin.
nomination.declare_statement: I hereby declare that all information provided is true to the best of my knowledge.
nomination.submit_confirm: Are you sure you want to submit your nomination? This action cannot be undone.
nomination.reg_success: Nomination Submitted Successfully! Your symbol will be assigned by Admin after verification.
nomination.no_face: No face detected in the photo. Please use a clear portrait.

about.title: About VoteOnline
about.mission_desc1: VoteOnline is a secure, transparent, and user-friendly digital voting platform designed to modernize the democratic process. Our mission is to increase voter participation by making voting accessible to everyone, everywhere, while ensuring the highest standards of security and integrity.
about.mission_desc2: Leveraging modern web technologies and secure authentication protocols, we provide a seamless experience for both voters and election officials.
about.security_desc: We utilize advanced encryption and secure socket layers to protect every vote. Our system ensures that once a vote is cast, it cannot be tampered with.
about.transparency_desc: The entire process, from voter registration to result declaration, is designed to be transparent and auditable, fostering trust in the electoral system.

contact.title: Contact Support
contact.subtitle: We are here to help you with any issues related to voting or registration.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.hq_address: Election Commission of India, Maduravayal, Ashoka Road, Chennai 680 061

profile.voted_desc: You have successfully voted in the current election.
profile.pending_desc: Please cast your vote before the deadline.

footer.desc: An initiative to enable secure, transparent, and accessible digital voting for everyone. Empowering democracy through technology.
footer.address: Ministry of Digital Affairs, New Delhi, India - 110001

news_ticker.label: Latest News
news_ticker.news1: General Elections 2026 dates announced! Voting starts April 1st.
news_ticker.news2: Candidate Registration closes on March 15th. Apply now!
news_ticker.news3: Check your Voter ID status in the dashboard.

chatbot.greeting: Hello! I'm your Election Assistant powered by AI. Ask me about live elections, your voting status, candidates, or how to vote!
chatbot.error_message: I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please try again in a moment.

success_modal.title: Vote Cast!
success_modal.subtitle: Your digital ballot has been securely sealed and counted.
success_modal.offline_subtitle: You are currently offline. Your vote has been securely stored on this device and will automatically sync once you reconnect.
success_modal.sync_success: Your offline vote has been successfully synchronized with the national server!

admin_login.portal_desc: Official Election Commission of India - Secure Administrator Access.
admin_login.title: Admin Login
admin_login.subtitle: Authorized personnel only
admin_login.access_denied: Access denied. This portal is for administrators only.

candidate_login.portal_desc: Manage your nomination, view constituency stats, and track election progress.
candidate_login.title: Candidate Login
candidate_login.subtitle: Enter your nominee credentials
candidate_login.access_denied: Access denied. This portal is for election candidates only.
